reviews.comment:
Está ubicada en un punto justo en la ,RN 16, además tiene todos los medios de pago y los sanitarios son muy limpios.

(Translated by Google)
It is located right on RN 16, and has all the payment methods and the restrooms are very clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/150634493343004521/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNjbGNUb213RRAB

reviews.comment:
Para empezar, todas las veces que paramos nos dicen que justo se les acabó la nafta super y que sólo tienen Premium y cuando reclamamos que ya era la segunda vez que nos decían que se "acababan de quedar sin nafta super" nos contestaron de manera burlona. Para completar, los baños estaban sucios y no había papel.

(Translated by Google)
To begin with, every time we stopped they told us they'd just run out of regular gas and only had premium, and when we complained that it was the second time they'd told us they'd "just run out of regular," they responded mockingly. To top it all off, the bathrooms were filthy and there was no toilet paper.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/150634493343004521/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzZ1pMWEpREAE

reviews.comment:
Si anas por estos lugares   tenes que pasar.. baños limpios, buena atención... no funcionaba el full cuando estuve.. pero el cargar combustible es una opción... la ruta te habrás dado cuenta si venís del Chaco...HORRIBLE.. no es una zona montañosa... son los.craters de la ruta

(Translated by Google)
If you're traveling through these parts, you have to stop by... clean bathrooms, good service... the gas station wasn't working when I was there, but filling up is an option... you'll have noticed the road if you're coming from Chaco... HORRIBLE... it's not a mountainous area... it's just potholes.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/150634493343004521/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURza3BLbnNBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buen servicio el de la estación ypf, pero la ruta de taco pozo es un desastre. La luna tiene menos cráteres que la ruta de santiago del estero.

(Translated by Google)
The YPF station has excellent service, but the Taco Pozo road is a disaster. The moon has fewer craters than the road to Santiago del Estero.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/150634493343004521/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzb3BTd3JBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención mejoraron un poco los sanitarios !! No olvidar de mantener siempre limpio porque pasa mucha personas y así evitar enfermedades y contagios

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, and the restrooms have been improved! Don't forget to keep them clean at all times, as many people pass through, to prevent illness and the spread of germs.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/150634493343004521/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzaEtqZHZRRRAB
